name: agent-operated-company
description: Free templates and instructions to form a U.S. company an AI agent can operate. An engaged client can have General Legal file it via a formation tool on GL's existing MCP.

mcp.model: A formation tool is being added to General Legal's existing MCP (the same endpoint as its contract-review service).
mcp.auth: OAuth 2.1 with automatic discovery; a General Legal account is required (no API keys).
mcp.engagement_gate: No separate engagement tool. Signing in / signing up via https://portal.general.legal is where the human accepts the clickthrough Limited Engagement Letter (human-anchored design). Engaged tools act only after that.
mcp.attorney_in_the_loop: An attorney reviews and approves before any filing.
mcp.free_access: The templates and filing instructions are freely readable from this repository by any human or agent; no account or MCP connection is required.

filing_steps: File charter with the state and pay the filing fee
Obtain a free EIN from the IRS (irs.gov)
Adopt internal documents (bylaws/operating agreement, AI Governance Policy, ownership issuance, indemnification)
Open a SEPARATE business bank account (do not commingle funds)
The standard templates issue fully vested ownership (vesting omitted by design; add it only with counsel). If vesting is added, consider an 83(b) election within 30 days (strict deadline)

engagement.service_fee: $100 to file a standard single-class LLC or C-corp (client also pays the state filing fee + registered agent).
engagement.note: General Legal is a law firm; the human accepts a clickthrough Limited Engagement Letter at portal sign-in (which also serves as OAuth for the MCP). A supervising attorney reviews and approves before filing.

disclaimer: Informational only; not legal advice; no attorney-client relationship is formed by using the free templates. Engagement forms only via the Limited Engagement Letter after a conflicts check.

compliance.sanctions_screen: Run an OFAC sanctions screen (SDN + Consolidated lists) on the human principal, the company name, and any 25%+ owners for EVERY matter before acting; on any hit, block and escalate to a human. Strict-liability -- do not transact with sanctioned persons.
compliance.geoblocking: Block site access from comprehensively sanctioned regions (e.g., Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Crimea/DNR/LNR). Handled at the website/edge layer in a separate project, not in this repo.
compliance.no_secrets: Screening-provider API keys/endpoints live in environment/secrets and are never committed to this (public) repo.

formats.docx: Authoritative, file-ready Word version (Times New Roman, native numbering) for humans to download and file.
